issue_title: MultivariateNormalDistribution.density(double[]) returns wrong value when the dimension is odd
issue_description:
To reproduce:

Assert.assertEquals(0.398942280401433, new MultivariateNormalDistribution(new double[]{0}, new double[][]{{1}}).density(new double[]{0}), 1e-15);

org.apache.commons.math3.distribution.Mu.error_msg:
